text:
birth time. Method
-3: Take the lagna longitude at the time of query. Keep the
sign part of this longitude aside and consider only the Degrees
and minutes. Do the same for longitude of Moon. Add the
Degree-Min portion of Lagna longitude and Moon's longitude
at query time. Multiply the resultant longitude with 9. This
could be navamsa longitude of Sun at birth time] The
interpreters of this sloka tells us that since 'the trines could
be considered everywhere' these resultant longitude could be
either the longitude of sun at BT or its trines.
As per Prasnamarga out of the many methods available
for determining longitude of Sun from the lagna longitude at
query time, the one that suit the natural possibility (i.e. at the
lOth month of pregnancy) should be taken. Three methods
for determining BT from query time is given in the above
sloka.
Some astrologers argue that these methods can be used
for BT rectification as well. As per them, when used for BT
